overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a green cloak exploring a cozy, dimly lit attic bedroom with thatched roofing and wooden beams. The character walks through the space, passing a bed, bookshelves, and a writing desk, while warm candlelight illuminates the traditional wooden interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy attic bedroom with thatched roof and wooden bed

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the attic toward a bed with red bedding

notable_agents.action: standing beside the bed facing the wall

entered.detail: steeply angled ceiling made of woven thatch material
thick timber beams supporting the roof structure
simple wooden balustrade along the walkway
lit wall-mounted lantern casting warm orange light
wooden bed frame with red bedding and canopy
small wooden storage chest at foot of bed
tall shelves filled with books along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit attic bedroom with a steep thatched roof and exposed wooden beams. Warm light from a wall sconce illuminates a wooden bed with red bedding ahead, where an NPC stands facing the wall. The camera follows the character as they approach the bed area, passing wooden railings and support beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper loft library area with bookshelves

events.description: character turns away from the bed and walks toward the bookshelves

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking along the wooden railing toward the bookshelves, looking up at the loft

entered.detail: elevated bookshelf area accessible by ladder above the main shelves
curved wooden desk with papers and writing materials
small arched window set into the sloped roof

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the bed, the character explores the library area lined with wooden bookshelves filled with tomes. The camera pans upward to reveal a loft area above the shelves, accessible by a ladder. The warm artificial lighting continues to cast orange hues across the wooden interior as the character moves along the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: study area with writing desk and candles

agents.ego_description: walking past the writing desk and continuing along the attic walkway

entered.detail: simple wooden chair positioned before the writing desk
cluster of burning candles providing warm illumination on the desk

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a curved writing desk adorned with lit candles and scattered papers, situated beneath a dormer window. A wooden chair sits before the desk, and bookshelves line the left wall. The scene maintains the cozy, enclosed atmosphere of the traditional wooden attic space.

scene_state.functional_zone: attic corridor leading to exit door

agents.ego_description: walking toward the arched doorway at the far end of the attic space

entered.detail: closed wooden door at the end of the attic walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving past the desk area, the character walks toward an arched wooden doorway at the far end of the attic. The thatched ceiling slopes down toward the door, with wooden support beams framing the path. The character continues exploring toward the exit, with dormer windows visible along the wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cozy, dimly lit attic bedroom that transitions from a sleeping area into a scholarly workspace and finally toward an exit. It begins by following a character in a green cloak past exposed wooden beams and a bed with red bedding, where warm light from a wall sconce illuminates the steep thatched roof. As the character turns away from the bed, the scene shifts toward a library area lined with bookshelves, with the camera panning upward to reveal a loft accessible by a ladder. The movement then flows toward a curved writing desk adorned with lit candles and scattered papers beneath a dormer window, maintaining the orange hues of the wooden interior. Finally, the camera tracks the character past the desk and under the sloping ceiling toward an arched wooden doorway at the far end of the attic.
